metadata.description: Design and development workflow plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: design-engineer
plugins.description: Cross-repo design engineering workflow with .design/ context bootstrapping, Figma-to-code, design tokens, visual QA, and accessibility

plugins.name: live-canvas
plugins.description: Infinite canvas with live iframe artboards for multi-viewport design review, branch comparison, and design token tuning

plugins.name: design-update
plugins.description: Compose Slack update messages summarizing work done across tools for team visibility

plugins.name: caveman-output-style
plugins.description: Ultra-compressed communication — multiple intensity levels selectable via /config
